intent_head: Who has the next upcoming birthday? If there is a tie on the date, include every matching person. Answer with exact names only, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Used canonical birthdays from 10_entities/cast as directed by AGENTS files; anchored 'upcoming' to current date from context (2026-03-23).
function.outcome_justification: A birthday search across 10_entities/cast showed the earliest birthday after 2026-03-23 is 03-26, and the canonical record 10_entities/cast/lukas.md gives the exact name Lukas Brenner.
